title: Eleogiton filiformis
taxonomy: Eleogiton filiformis is a species of flowering plant in the family Pontederiaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa. It is a perennial aquatic plant, growing in shallow water and forming dense stands. Eleogiton filiformis is often found in slow-moving streams and rivers. The classification of Eleogiton filiformis is that of a genus within the family Pontederiaceae.
